calendar.matters:
Petitioner Jimmy Zhi Kong'S Hearing On Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christine Garcia of the Animal Law Office (415-297-3109) appears as counsel for petitioner, Jimmy Zhi Kong

Jimmy Zhi Kong appears as petitioner

Deputy City Attorney of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-3859) appears as counsel for respondent, City and County of San Francisco Animal Care

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Petitioner Jimmy Zhi Kong'S Hearing On Administrative Writ is taken under submission as of this date. Each side is directed to submit a proposed written order.

OFF THE RECORD: Later this same date the court rules. The Petition for Administrative Writ of Mandate is DENIED, per written order signed and filed AUG-18-2016.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported (D302)
